title: minecarty
body:
Take your Minecraft experience to the next level with minecarty, a brand new modpack designed for Fabric 24w33a!

Key Features of the update:

New Expirement for minecarts that makes them better

New Textures for the redstone torch

and a new expirement for new redstone system

Compatibility:

Minecarty is compatible with Minecraft 24w33a (Fabric) only. 

Support:

If you have any questions or issues with the mod, feel free to join the discord server here: [https://discord.gg/YKV3TK5pTw](https://discord.gg/YKV3TK5pTw)

## now:

### Get ready to experience Minecraft like never before with Minecarty!
